title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 14–17, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If you dare laugh at usopp again, I will...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I thought I already warned you...

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Even the hypno- Tized Buchi was...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Luffy, I'm gonna take usopp and go after that bastard hypnotist!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Do you have any problem with that?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It would actually be faster if I go alone

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But we're going into the woods...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And if you don't guide me, I won't be able to find them

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Who said you could get through me?

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
